title: 国連 カンボディア問題国際会議
check_items: 開始年月日;終了年月日;目次;史料概要
decide: If 1981 International Conference on Kampuchea/Cambodia is explicit, assign CAMBODIA_INTL_CONFERENCE_1981
keywords_to_find: 1981;カンボジア問題国際会議;Kampuchea;International Conference;国連

title: 国連代表権問題／国連中国代表権問題
look_at: MOFA material-detail page, then TOC/body if broad
check_items: 開始年月日;終了年月日;目次;whether 1971 vote/Resolution 2758/immediate reactions are explicit
decide: Assign UNGA_2758_1971_CHINA_REPRESENTATION only to records directly about the 1971 vote/decision or immediate reactions
keywords_to_find: 1971;2758;重要事項指定;アルバニア案;中国代表権;総会決議;投票;各国の態度
notes: Do not assign to broad China representation files unless 1971 decision is central.

title: 中共・インド国境紛争
check_items: 目次;sections on mediation;named countries;Colombo proposals
decide: If neutral six-country mediation/Colombo proposals are explicit, assign SINO_INDIAN_BORDER_MEDIATION_1962_COLOMBO
keywords_to_find: 中立六か国;中立6か国;コロンボ;Colombo;セイロン;ビルマ;カンボジア;ガーナ;インドネシア;アラブ連合共和国

title: AAPSO個別会議名・開催年
check_items: individual conference name;location;year;whether it is AAPSO or related peoples conference
decide: If specific conference is explicit, create individual AAPSO event_id; otherwise keep AAPSO_CONFERENCE_SERIES
keywords_to_find: アジア・アフリカ人民連帯会議;アジア・アフリカ諸国民会議;カイロ;アクラ;モシ;AAPSO;開催地;年月

title: 国連中国代表権問題のbloc確認
check_items: whether African/AA states coordinate, caucus, jointly propose, or vote as a named group
decide: Assign AFRICAN_GROUP or AFRO_ASIAN_BLOC only if collective action/common position is explicit
keywords_to_find: アフリカ・グループ;AA諸国;アジア・アフリカ;共同提案;共同歩調;投票行動;グループ会合

title: Bandung/AAPSO系のbloc確認
look_at: TOC/body only if there are sections on common position/group action
check_items: whether AA bloc/common AA position is explicit
decide: Usually keep bloc_ids blank; add AFRO_ASIAN_BLOC only for explicit bloc action
keywords_to_find: AAブロック;AA諸国;共通態度;共同提案;共同声明;投票グループ

title: ICJ裁判官選挙の共産圏確認
check_items: whether source says 共産圏諸国 as a collective category or only lists countries
decide: Assign SOCIALIST_BLOC only if collective category/actor is explicit
keywords_to_find: 共産圏諸国;社会主義圏;ソ連・共産圏;東側;投票
notes: If merely a list, keep blank.

title: 文革イベント確認
look_at: MOFA material-detail dates first, then TOC/body
check_items: 1966-1967 date coverage; explicit 文革/文化大革命 or diplomatic effects
decide: Assign CULTURAL_REVOLUTION_1966_1976 only if dates and context support it
keywords_to_find: 文化大革命;文革;紅衛兵;造反;大使館;対外関係;1966;1967;中国国内情勢

title: UNGA第36回総会／三大陸連帯会議
check_items: whether records exist in or outside current dataset
decide: If found, add archive_id and then create event_id
keywords_to_find: 国連第36回総会;第36回国連総会;三大陸;三大陸連帯会議;ハバナ;Tricontinental;OSPAAAL
notes: These are search tasks, not current-record checks.
